programs.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programs.desc: Rachael shows how to make a marinated vegetable-infused dish of tteokbokki, a popular Korean food made from rice cakes.

programs.title: Masterchef Australia
programs.desc: A mystery box challenge with a saucy twist. The cooks must use at least one of six Asian sauces to cook a showstopping dish, with the bottom four headed for tomorrow's pressure test.

programs.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programs.desc: Five Willow Fish is a Taiwanese dish that makes great use of the nation's affluent fishery. Chef Long interprets this dish with masterful skills, and Jason creates a dish inspired by Five Willow Fish.

programs.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programs.sub_title: Cheese Fondue With Vegetables, Sausage And Beef Tips
programs.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent 'Fundue' that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programs.title: The K-Gim Revolution
programs.desc: From the Korean table to tables around the world, gim is gaining global recognition. What makes gim so compelling? Michelin three-star chef Anh Sung-jae follows the journey of gim as a K-food icon.

programs.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programs.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.
